channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigerian children face malnutrition crisis linked to Iranian war and economic strain
item.description: The article highlights how the Iranian war's economic fallout is worsening malnutrition and poverty in Nigeria, particularly affecting children. Rising fuel prices from the conflict have led to higher...

item.title: Spain wins second World Cup after thrilling final against Argentina
item.description: Spanish fans celebrated wildly across Madrid after their team secured a historic second FIFA World Cup title with a dramatic victory over Argentina. The match, held in Lusail Stadium, saw Spain overco...

item.title: Antonelli Secures F1 Title Lead with Belgian Grand Prix Victory
item.description: Kimi Antonelli claimed a dominant victory at the Belgian Grand Prix, extending his lead in the Formula 1 championship. The 19-year-old Italian overcame challenges from Charles Leclerc and a troubled r...

item.title: Gibbons and Grove claim Amashova titles as event marks 40th anniversary
item.description: Ryan Gibbons and S'annara Grove secured victory in the men's and women's elite categories at the 40th edition of the Amashova Classic, a 106km race from Pietermaritzburg to Durban. Gibbons, returning ...

item.title: NGX Group CEO outlines key sectors for Nigeria's economic growth
item.description: Temi Popoola, CEO of NGX Group, has highlighted artificial intelligence, energy, and agriculture as critical sectors for Nigeria's future economic growth. He emphasized that these areas are essential ...

item.title: Experts urge compassionate communication when delivering tragic news to reduce psychological and health risks
item.description: Mental health specialists and medical professionals are warning that the way tragic news is communicated can have a major impact on a person's emotional and physical wellbeing. According to the report...

item.title: Spain clinch World Cup triumph with extra-time victory over Argentina
item.description: In a dramatic World Cup final at the MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, Spain secured their second title after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Argentina. Ferran Torres, a late substitute, scored the decisi...

item.title: U.S. Troop Death in Israel-Hamas Conflict as Israel Warns of Iranian Attacks
item.description: The article highlights the escalating tensions in the Israel-Hamas conflict, with the U.S. military confirming the death of a troop in the region. Israel has issued warnings that Iran is preparing att...

item.title: Antonelli Claims Victory in Thrilling Belgian GP as Teammate Retires
item.description: Kimi Antonelli secured a decisive victory at the Belgian Grand Prix, marking a significant step toward championship glory. His win came amid dramatic circumstances, with teammate George Russell retiri...

item.title: ACT Paramedics Equip with Advanced Training Room to Tackle Workplace Violence
item.description: The ACT Ambulance Service has introduced a cutting-edge immersive simulation environment called BLISS to better prepare paramedics for unpredictable and violent frontline incidents. This facility tran...

item.title: Kashmiri Pandits Reconnect with Vichar Nag Temple After Decades
item.description: The historic Vichar Nag Temple in Srinagar, once a hub of militancy, witnessed a significant puja ceremony on July 20, 2026. Scores of Kashmiri Pandits gathered at the site, which had previously hoste...

item.title: Spain Wins 2026 FIFA World Cup with Extra-Time Goal Against 10-Man Argentina
item.description: In a dramatic conclusion to the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Spain secured their second title after a hard-fought 1-0 extra-time victory over Argentina. Substitute Ferran Torres scored the decisive goal in th...

item.title: US soldiers killed in Iranian attack as Trump faces political pressure
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has not made a public statement since news broke that two American soldiers were killed in an Iranian attack on U.S. forces in Jordan. After spending hours at his golf club...

item.title: Broadcasters Confused by Trump's Uninvited Appearance at World Cup Trophy Ceremony
item.description: The article details President Donald Trump's controversial appearance at the FIFA World Cup Final in New York, where he joined FIFA President Gianni Infantino on the field for the trophy presentation ...

item.title: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' sets global box office record
item.description: Christopher Nolan's adaptation of Homer's ancient epic, 'The Odyssey,' has achieved a global box office gross of $264.1 million, with $124.5 million generated in the US and Canada. The film, starring ...

item.title: Spain clinch second World Cup title after extra-time victory over 10-man Argentina
item.description: Spain secured their second FIFA World Cup title after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over 10-man Argentina in the 2026 final. The match, held on July 19, 2026, saw Ferran Torres score the decisive goal in ...

item.title: Spain clinch 2026 FIFA World Cup after extra-time victory over Argentina
item.description: Spain has been crowned 2026 FIFA World Cup champions after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Argentina in the final at the New York/New Jersey Stadium in East Rutherford. The match, which stretched into ...

item.title: US and Iran escalate military conflict after soldier deaths
item.description: The US has launched fresh military strikes against Iran's coastal and air defense systems following the killing of two American soldiers in an Iranian attack on a US base in Jordan. Iran has vowed ret...

item.title: Opposition Parties Protest Government's Invite to TMC Rebels at All-Party Meeting
item.description: Opposition parties in India staged a rare walkout from an all-party meeting to protest the government's invitation to TMC rebels, highlighting internal political tensions. The TMC, led by Mamata Baner...

item.title: Arrests of Barangay Chairman and SK Members in Negros Island Highlight Joint Law Enforcement Efforts
item.description: Local law enforcement authorities in Negros Island have successfully arrested a barangay chairman, a Sangguniang Kabataan (Youth Council) executive, and a Chinese national who were previously listed a...
